expectations.evidence: Starts with 'hermai registry list --query jsonplaceholder' and shows API catalog query with X-Hermai-Intent header.
Shows full table of endpoints with base URL https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com and all resource paths.
Both pull and catalog commands include intent: 'looking up all available REST API endpoints for testing my application'.
Includes 5 curl examples with jq: get posts, create post, get comments, filter todos, update post.
